user_story: As an Employee, I want to acknowledge documents pending my acknowledgement, so that I confirm I have read them
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a pending acknowledgement in the Employees list; When I open its Task and acknowledge the document; Then its status changes to Acknowledged with an acknowledged date

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter acknowledgements by status, so that I can track pending, acknowledged, and expired items
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Acknowledgements screen; When I select a status such as Pending acknowledgements, Acknowledged, or Expired; Then only matching records are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter acknowledgements by acknowledgement type and department, so that I can review a specific document category or team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Acknowledgements screen; When I select an acknowledgement type and department; Then only matching acknowledgements are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter by active or inactive employees and by period, so that I can scope acknowledgements to the right people and dates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Acknowledgements screen; When I choose Active or Inactive employees and a From and To period; Then the list reflects the selected scope

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset acknowledgement results, so that I can refine or clear my query quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
